title: Allow findings list in adversarial-project
goal: Add 'Bash(mini findings list:*)' to ADVERSARIAL_PROJECT_ALLOWED_TOOLS in src/commands/adversarialProject.ts so the prompt-instructed dedup step (mini findings list) in the reviewer session does not trigger a permission prompt, and update the pinning test of allowed tools.

steps.title: Add findings list to allowed tools
steps.detail: In src/commands/adversarialProject.ts add 'Bash(mini findings list:*)' to ADVERSARIAL_PROJECT_ALLOWED_TOOLS, before 'mini findings add' (read-only step before the write). Top comment stays valid: list is read-only, add is still the only write.

steps.title: Update allowed-tools pinning test
steps.detail: In src/commands/adversarialProject.test.ts add 'Bash(mini findings list:*)' to the expected toEqual array (lines 98-107) so it matches the new set; keep not.toContain('Edit').

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and tests pass
steps.detail: Run build, typecheck and tests; confirm adversarialProject.test.ts is green and no other snapshot/pinning test of the tool set broke.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 175: Allow findings list in adversarial-project
